Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: liturgical costume [300210414], ceremonial costume [300210387], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: shawls [300209991], outerwear [300209265], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shawl-like garments, often of wool or silk, with fringe at the four corners; worn around the shoulders by Jewish males usually during the morning service.
Prenda en forma de chal, frecuentemente de lana o sea, con flecos en sus cuatro esquinas; la suelen llevar alrededor de los hombors los varones judíos durante el servicio de la mañana.
Sjaalachtige kledingstukken, vaak van wol of zijde, met franjes aan de vier hoeken; worden door joodse mannen om de schouders gedragen, meestal tijdens de ochtenddienst.
似披肩的服裝，常由羊毛或絲製成，四角有穗；由猶太教男性披在肩上，通常於晨間禮拜時穿著。
Schalähnliches Kleidungsstück, oft aus Wolle oder Seide, mit Fransen an den vier Ecken; von jüdischen Männern um die Schultern während des morgendlichen Gottesdienstes getragen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
